user_query: How do I use BackgroundTasks in FastAPI?
ground_truth: You can use the BackgroundTasks class to define tasks to run after the response is sent. Import it from fastapi and add it as a parameter to your path operation function.

user_query: Is there a known bug with OAuth2 scopes in v0.110?
ground_truth: Yes, issue #1234 mentions a discrepancy in how OAuth2 scopes are evaluated when using Dependency Injection.
